_comment: Species: Spirit Toad (灵蟾) from Renegade Immortal. Per user directive: every miscellaneous beast from RI must be accounted for and part of the ecosystem. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Spirit Toad

canonical.appearance: Toad 0.5 m, skin spirit-green, throat sac glows with spirit-light
canonical.size: 0.5 m adult, 20 jin; ancient 2 m, 500 jin
canonical.behavior: Ambush predator near springs; cultivates by absorbing water+dawn essence
canonical.relationships: Lesser kin of thunder toad; prey for spirit snakes
canonical.bloodline: Spirit-Toad lineage; water-attribute bloodline (dilute thunder toad)
canonical.ecology: Integrated into RI ecosystem definitions; see ecosystem_integration.

inner_dan_properties.alchemy_use: No alchemy value — common beast with no condensed inner core
inner_dan_properties.canon_note: spirit_toad — common beast, no condensed inner core

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
